<!-- Design language DL-05 OBEYA token block -->

## Design language: OBEYA (DL-05)

**See together. Decide together.** Japan: Collaboration and shared visibility.

Status: adopted. Occasions: stand-up boards, site wall prints, war rooms, A3 posters.

### Design laws

- Information remains visible
- Ownership is explicit
- Progress is collaborative
- Large readable typography
- Decisions happen around the information

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | question-first |
| density | operational |
| annotation_policy | minimal |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | dual |
| decision_style | options |
| reading_time | glance |
| charts_per_page | 4 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| ink | `#0F172A` |
| body | `#334155` |
| hairline | `#64748B` |
| gridline | `#CBD5E1` |
| primary | `#C2410C` |
| muted | `#64748B` |
| positive | `#1F7A4D` |
| negative | `#B91C1C` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 600

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
